description: Letter from a community of Jews (ʿabīduhā jamāʿat yahūd [...]) to the dignitary Yakhin b. Netanʾel (a.k.a. Abū l-Faḍl Thābit b. Hibatallāh) Rosh ha-Qehillot (روش هقهلوت). Probably a letter of recommendation for charity for the bearer of this note (hādhihi al-khidma), who has lived in the community for 20 years, but has been unable to support himself in this difficult year. (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
